shared_properties: Prisoner silhouette stays inside 16x24 px with a narrow torso, cuffed wrists, and a readable orange shoulder stripe.
Core palette metadata remains primary #3B3347, background #0D0D0F, and accent #E07B39 while asset-local colors stay inside specs.colors_hex.
Every occupied frame uses a 1 px outline and preserves the downward-facing centerline needed for collision readability.
differences: Four frames show coat hem flutter, knees tucked inward by 1 px, and a controlled free-fall pose for the default descent state.
The head tilts downward by 1 px in frames 2 and 3 to reinforce momentum without implying a jump input.
Hands stay off the wall so this sheet reads as non-contact descent rather than braking.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the no-jump descent loop, 16x24 player scale, and authored movement limits for the default falling state.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the cold dungeon palette, vertical shaft framing, and low-saturation pixel-art mood around the falling silhouette.

reference_images.label: player_concept
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the prisoner costume layers, orange accent placement, and falling body proportion for the main character sheet.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle with TextureAtlasLayout and a fixed-step animation timer driven by Bevy 0.13 FixedUpdate.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load through AssetServer during a Loading state, register the atlas handle by task_id and asset_key, and keep animation metadata in a typed DescentActorVisual resource.
runtime_notes: Advance frames at the authored fps inside FixedUpdate so movement logic and animation cadence stay locked at 60 FPS.
Use flip_x for mirrored wall contact instead of authoring an extra right-facing sheet.
Snap the actor Transform to whole pixels after motion integration so the 16x24 silhouette stays crisp on the 4x upscale.

context.usage: Default player visual while descending without friction contact.

silhouette_notes: Top of head occupies y0-y5 and never clips beyond the 24 px height.
Ankles stay inside x4-x12 so the hurtbox center remains readable during fast descent.
Orange shoulder stripe occupies a 2x4 px patch on the upper-left torso in every frame.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 64x24 px with 4 frames of 16x24 px and 0 px spacing.
Animation plays at 8 fps and every frame keeps the prisoner centered within a 10 px wide collision-safe core.
Only listed colors plus transparency are used and no anti-aliasing or sub-pixel shading appears.
